title: Eastern Flatbread Grilled Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that brings the taste of the East to your plate. This recipe combines the crunch of crispy flatbread with the richness of grilled buttery goodness.
instructions: 2. Cut the flatbread into desired shapes or keep as is.
3. Brush both sides of the flatbread with buttery spread.
4. Grill the flatbread for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
5. Meanwhile, prepare your choice of crisp vegetables.
6. Assemble the grilled flatbread with crispy vegetables and enjoy!
